mapper.select: SELECT st.id, st.NAME,st.picture, st.limit_apply_max,IFNULL(mta.applyTotal, 0) AS applyTotal, st.begin_date, st.linkman_telephone, st.end_date,st.industry_code, st.address, st.introduce_text,create_time FROM scenic_task st LEFT JOIN (SELECT task_id, COUNT(task_id) AS applyTotal FROM member_task_apply) mta ON mta.task_id = st.id WHERE st.mch_id = #{mchId} ORDER BY st.create_time DESC, applyTotal DESC
SELECT st.id, st.NAME , st.create_time, st.audit_status FROM scenic_task st WHERE st.create_by_id =#{userId}
SELECT mta.create_by_name,mb.user_img FROM member_task_apply mta LEFT JOIN(SELECT user_id,user_img FROM member)mb on mb.user_id = mta.user_id WHERE task_id=#{id}
